name: Roasted Potatoes with Garlic
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds small potatoes (Red Bliss, small whites, Yukon Gold, Yellow Finns, or Fingerling potatoes)
3 cloves garlic, peeled and finely minced
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Leaving their skins on, scrub the potatoes with a brush to remove any dirt or blemishes. Dry them with paper towels or a cloth.
3. Cut the potatoes in half or into quarters, depending on size.
4. Pour olive oil into a roasting pan or large cast iron skillet and heat in the 350-degree oven for ten minutes before adding the potatoes.
5. Roast the potatoes for 45 minutes, until crisp. Shake the pan several times during cooking so the potatoes roll around to brown evenly.
6. Remove from the oven and drain on paper towels or a cloth to absorb excess oil. Place in a serving dish.
7. In a sauté pan, melt butter, add garlic, and sauté until light golden brown. Add chopped herbs and stir together quickly. Remove from heat.
8. Pour garlic herb butter over potatoes, season with salt and pepper, and serve.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
